> APOKALYPSIS: Lost Magic Awakening > Prologue
Prologue
APOKALYPSIS: Lost Magic Awakening by KuyaImbo
167 0 12
Advertisements
X
Reading Options
Font Size
A- 15px A+
Width
Reset
X
Table of Contents
Loading... please wait.
PreviousNext

“Hey…

 

You may not recognize me consciously…

 

But deep in your heart, I know that my voice will resonate with you.

 

I know that my words will echo in your soul.

 

Are you feeling it? The sign of the times?

 

Do you believe that the world is heading into irreversible chaos?

 

Do you believe that society is slowly crumbling into its demise?

 

And the people are too distracted to notice these obvious signs?

 

Are you having a hard time keeping up with the tides of the time?

 

Are you struggling to fit in? And the only solution you can think of is to drown yourself in solitude?

 

Do you feel that you are not made for this world? Are you having a deep longing for something? 

 

Something you know you can’t find in this world? A home that you can never go back to?

 

Don’t worry. I know what you’re feeling. I know it’s been hard for you.

 

I’m just here to say that you’re doing great. You’re doing well with the current tools that you have.

 

Just hold on tight. Everything will be better for you. 

 

And although the signs in the stars are always telling you that everything will not return the way it was - I want to tell you that everything will align in your favor someday. 

 

You’re exactly where you need to be. Just trust the process.

 

Even though you feel like an outcast and you feel like nobody understands you, just know that you’re not alone.

 

It’s okay if they don’t understand. Someday your words will be heard by the world. 

 

As their eyes continue to open, their ears start to listen, their heart starts to beat, and their soul starts to ascend… the veil will soon be lifted.

 

Does your ego doubt the call of freedom of your soul? Please… don’t ignore the burning liberation growing inside your heart. 

 

Listen to the voice that says you have a higher purpose - it might be your calling.

 

Your mind might tell you that you’re just going insane. But you’re not crazy…

….

….

….

 

You’re just waking up.”

12
